description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house surrounded by lush green and pink-blossomed trees, creating a secluded and tranquil environment. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white facade, with some wooden panel accents visible on the exterior. The main entryway is marked by a simple door, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light inside. The landscaping is dense, with trees closely encircling the house, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, enhancing the modern architectural style. Outdoor furniture and small objects are visible near the house, suggesting a lived-in, comfortable residential space.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by dense green and pink-blossomed trees. The minimalist design and lush landscaping create a private, contemporary residential setting.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house partially obscured by trees, with the flat roof and some interior details visible through large windows.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the main entryway, a prominent window, and the dense arrangement of trees around the house.
description_view_2: View 2 reveals a side of the house with a large window and wooden paneling, as well as more of the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear of the house, with the flat roof, additional windows, and the thick tree coverage most prominent.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple modern door with no porch, steps, or decorative elements, integrated into the minimalist facade
